content: Garcinia Cambodia contains hydroxycitric acid (HCA), which increases serotonin production and inhibits citrate lyase, an enzyme involved in converting carbohydrates to fat.
Garcinia Cambodia has been shown to have a negligible effect on weight loss, averaging between one and two pounds in most studies, with a two times higher risk for gastrointestinal issues.
Green tea extract (EGCG) enhances metabolism through multiple pathways and affects appetite, leading to an average of 30-50% more fat loss compared to Garcinia Cambodia in meta-analysis studies.

EGCG from green tea is a natural stimulant that improves mental clarity and alertness, but it also has a higher potential to keep users wired throughout the night, making it advisable to consume it earlier in the day.
